summary: Frontend-only testing of P1/P2 audit fixes for LEXA Lifestyle website. Major issues found: Footer missing TikTok and X/Twitter social icons (only 4 of 6 shown), Tier cards linking to wrong URL, Catalogues page has pt-20 instead of pt-24.

ui_bugs.issue: TikTok and X/Twitter social icons are NOT rendered despite being in the code (lines 77-86). Only 4 icons visible: Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube
Tier cards (Basic, Advanced, Gold, Platinum) link to /packages/smart-apartment-packages instead of /package-builder?property=smart-apartment-packages&tier={tier}
Page has pt-20 class instead of pt-24 as specified. Current padding: 80px instead of expected 96px

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on social icons - currently have aria-labels but no data-testid

action_items: 1. Fix Footer.tsx - TikTok and X/Twitter icons not rendering. Code shows them but live site doesn't display. May need build/deployment or there's conditional rendering hiding them
2. Fix packages/page.tsx - Tier cards should link to /package-builder with query params, not /packages/smart-apartment-packages
3. Fix catalogues/page.tsx - Change pt-20 to pt-24 for proper header clearance
4. Add data-testid attributes to social icons in Footer.tsx (currently missing)
critical_code_review_comments: Footer.tsx code (lines 77-86) shows TikTok and X/Twitter icons with data-testid, but live site only shows 4 icons - code may not be deployed or there's a rendering issue
packages/page.tsx code (lines 156-170) shows correct tier card links to package-builder with query params, but live site shows different behavior - build/cache issue suspected
The social_links object in Footer may be overriding the hardcoded icons if CMS returns incomplete data

success_rate.frontend: 50% - 3 of 6 features verified working (blog author fallback logic present, schedule modal responsive, catalogues page loads)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Focus on verifying Footer social icons and Packages tier card links after fixes. The OurPromise component may need to be tested on the homepage if it's rendered there. Blog author shows 'LEXA Team' which is different from 'LEXA Editorial' but this is correct if the DB has author set to 'LEXA Team'.

verified_features.notes: Quick Booking modal works on mobile and is responsive. Different modal component than ScheduleVisitModal.tsx
Author shows 'LEXA Team' not 'LEXA Editorial'. The fallback logic in code only applies when author is 'Aura'

failed_features.notes: Only 4 icons displayed, TikTok and X/Twitter missing
Links go to /packages/smart-apartment-packages instead of /package-builder with query params
Page has pt-20 instead of pt-24
